# PHImageRequestOptionsDeliveryMode.fastFormat

**Case**

Photos provides only a fast-loading image, possibly sacrificing image quality.

## Declaration

```swift
case fastFormat
```

## Discussion

Photos calls your `resultHandler` block once. If a high-quality image cannot be loaded quickly, the result handler provides a low-quality image. Check the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageResultIsDegradedKey] key in the info dictionary to determine the quality of image provided to the result handler.

This option is available only if the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/isSynchronous] property is `false`.

## Constants

- **PHImageRequestOptionsDeliveryMode.opportunistic**: Photos automatically provides one or more results in order to balance image quality and responsiveness.
- **PHImageRequestOptionsDeliveryMode.highQualityFormat**: Photos provides only the highest-quality image available, regardless of how much time it takes to load.
